title: Paper Mate Flair DUAL Felt Tip Pens | Brush and Medium Tips (0.7mm) | Double Ended Colouring Pens | Assorted Colours | 8 Count
features: DOUBLE THE CREATIVITY: Dual-ended Flair coloured pens with a brush tip on one end and medium (0.7mm) tip on the other
THE FELT TIP PEN FOR VISIONARIES: Brush tip adds an extra level of artistry to hand lettering, journaling, note-taking and more; anti-roll cap prevents pen from rolling away when you're in the flow
FLEXIBLE EXPRESSION: Supple brush tip makes it easy to change line widths as you go; medium tip is perfect for writing or drawing with finer details
CLEAR, CRISP RESULTS: Smear- and fade-resistant ink that doesn’t bleed through paper
INCLUDES: 8 vivid felt tip pens in the colours Orchid Lei, Red, Guava, Marigold, Lime, Surf's Up, Blueberry Bubblegum and Black
description: From the manufacturer Paper Mate Flair Felt Tip Pens Fact: dull, smudgy ink is a downer. So boost your writing fun-factor with Paper Mate Flair Felt Tip Pens! With bright colours and smear-resistant ink that won’t bleed through the page, these coloured pens make writing, colouring and creating a blast. At a Glance… Bright colours make your writing pop Smear-resistant ink won’t bleed through paper Perfect for writing, drawing, colouring, journalling and more Available in a range of tip styles and colours Ultra Fine Point Produces clean and precise lines to keep your writing on point. Medium Point Produces bold and expressive lines to match your personality. Dual Point Medium tip on one end and a brush tip on the other which adds an extra level of artistry to hand lettering, journaling, note-taking and more.
